base_rows.story:
He live in a small house with a red door.  
One morning, he wake up and see his key is not in the box.  
He look in all the room, but no key.  
He go to the garden and see a blue bird.  
The bird fly to the tree and sit on a chair.  
He ask the bird: "Do you know where my key is?"  
The bird say: "I see it in the wall."  
He run to the wall and find a small hole.  
He put his hand in and feel a cold thing.  
He pull it out and see a new key.  
He laugh and say: "This is not my key!"  
He go to the park and meet his friend.  
His friend say: "I found your key yesterday."  
He feel happy and go home.  
He know now that the key was in the box all the time.

The cat sat on the chair and looked at the window.  
He saw a mouse running in the garden.  
He wanted to catch the mouse, but the mouse was fast.  
The mouse ran into the house and hid under the table.  
The cat jumped and looked under the table.  
He found a red box with a key inside.  
He opened the box and saw a small blue book.  
The book had a word: "journey".  
He read it and felt happy.  
He knew the mouse had a journey to the castle.  
The castle was far, on a hill with a red roof.  
He asked the dog if he knew the way.  
The dog said, "No, but I saw a bird go to the castle."  
The cat said, "Then I will go on a journey to the castle."  
He walked with a small hat and a book.  
He went to the castle and found the mouse.  
They were friends and played together.  
The cat smiled and said, "We have a new story."

The cat sat on the chair and looked at the window.  
It was a cold morning and the sky was blue.  
A small dog ran into the garden and barked.  
He saw a red ball under the tree.  
He wanted to play with it.  
He jumped and caught the ball.  
He smiled and said, "Good day!"  
Then he saw a mouse with a long **whisker**.  
The mouse looked at him and said, "Hello!"  
He gave the mouse a piece of cheese.  
The mouse **whisked** his nose and ran away.  
He felt happy and went to the park.  
He saw a man with a big **umbrella**.  
The man said, "I need help!"  
He gave him a book and a piece of bread.  
They sat together and told a story.  
The sun came out and the day was warm.

The dog in the garden was very funny.  
He jump into the box and sit on top.  
He look at the cat and say, "I have a new name!"  
The cat say, "You are not brave!"  
But the dog stand up and run to the door.  
He find a red ball and start to play.  
He discover a small hole under the wall.  
He go in and see a mouse.  
He laugh and run out again.  
He want to play with the ball again.  
He go to the park and meet a friend.  
They play and eat cheese.  
The dog feel happy and warm.  
He know he is brave now.

The garden is quiet in the morning.  
A small red bird sits on a branch.  
She sees a mouse running near the wall.  
The mouse hides under a big stone.  
He looks at the stone and sees a small hole.  
A cat walks slowly and stops.  
She looks at the hole and sees a red ball.  
She thinks: "This is a mystery!"  
She asks the cat: "Do you know what it is?"  
The cat says: "I don’t know, but I feel it."  
They go to the garden door and open it.  
They find a box with a blue hat inside.  
The cat says: "This is not a mystery!"  
They laugh and sit on the chair.  
The sun comes out and the garden feels warm.

It was a quiet night in the old house.  
The cat sat on the window seat and looked outside.  
She saw a small red bird flying in the garden.  
The bird made a funny sound and jumped into a box.  
We all laughed because it was so silly.  
Then the wind came and the box closed.  
I asked the cat: “Do you know what that was?”  
She said: “It was a new kind of adventure.”  
We all stood up and ran to the garden.  
We found a key under the table.  
We opened the door and saw a blue box.  
Inside, there was a book with a red hat.  
We read the story and felt happy.  
The night ended with a warm smile.

It was a quiet night in the old house.  
The cat sat on the window seat and looked outside.  
She saw a small bird flying in the garden.  
The bird made a funny sound and jumped into a box.  
We all laughed because it was so silly.  
Then, a red hat appeared on the floor.  
We did not know who put it there.  
A wizard stood in the hall with a big book.  
He said, “I found a magic key in the wall.”  
We all ran to the door and looked inside.  
The key opened a secret room behind the wall.  
In the room, there was a blue fish and a red chair.  
We sat down and told a story about the bird.  
The wizard smiled and said, “That was a good story.”  
We all felt happy and warm.  
The night ended with a quiet smile.

I live in a small house with a garden.  
Every morning, I go to the garden and see a red bird.  
The bird sits on a tree and sings a happy song.  
I ask the bird, "What is your name?"  
He says, "I am Tom."  
Tom is a funny bird with a blue hat.  
We play together in the garden.  
We jump, run, and hide behind the wall.  
One day, Tom says, "Let’s go on an adventure!"  
I say, "An adventure?" I don’t know what that means.  
Tom shows me a box with a key inside.  
He says, "This key opens a secret door."  
We go into the door and find a small room.  
In the room, we see a red chair and a book.  
We sit and read the book.  
We laugh and feel happy.  
Tom says, "We will go on many adventures again."

The boy found a key in the garden.  
He looked in the basket and saw a red ball.  
He went to the house and asked the cat.  
The cat said, "That key is for the castle."  
He ran to the castle and saw a big door.  
The door was closed and locked.  
He tried to open it with the key.  
But the key did not fit.  
He sat on the floor and felt sad.  
Then he saw a small bird in the tree.  
The bird said, "Look! The key is in your hand!"  
He looked again and saw the key in his basket.  
He smiled and went home.  
He told his friend about the castle and the key.  
They played in the garden and found more keys.

A small cat named Miso lived in a quiet house.  
He liked to sit by the window and watch birds.  
One morning, he saw a red ball in the garden.  
He asked the dog, "Do you know who dropped it?"  
The dog said, "I don’t know, but it looks like a creature."  
Miso felt surprised. He had never heard that word before.  
He looked around and saw a small hole in the wall.  
He thought, "Maybe a creature hid there."  
He went to the garden and found a tiny mouse.  
The mouse looked sad and had a blue hat.  
Miso said, "You are not a creature. You are a friend."  
The mouse smiled and said, "I lost my food."  
Miso gave him a piece of cheese.  
They sat together and told a story about the red ball.  
Miso felt happy and knew he had a new friend.

A blue bird lived in a big tree.  
He liked to sit on a branch and watch the garden.  
One morning, he saw a small mouse hiding under the floor.  
He wanted to help, so he whispered, "Don’t be afraid!"  
The mouse jumped up and ran away.  
The bird felt sad because he had not seen the mouse again.  
He asked the wind, "Do you know where the mouse went?"  
The wind said, "I heard a secret in the garden."  
He looked around and saw a red box with a key.  
He thought, "Maybe the mouse hid inside."  
He went to the box and opened it.  
Inside, he found a book with a secret word.  
He read it and smiled.  
He knew the mouse was safe.  
Now, every day, he whispers to the tree, "I love you."

It was a rainy day. The rain fell loud and cold. I sat on the chair and read a book. The window was wet and blue. A cat jumped on the table. She looked at me and smiled. I asked her, "Do you like rain?" She said, "Yes, it is quiet." I felt happy. I put a basket on the floor. The basket was full of food. I saw a small bird in the tree. It looked sad. I gave it a piece of cheese. The bird jumped and flew away. I felt warm and happy. The rain stopped and the sun came out. We all went to the garden. We played with a red ball. The day was not bad at all.

tuned_rows.story:
You need a key to open the door, but the key is not here. You feel sad and start a journey to find it.

A journey is when you walk or run from one place to another. You go out into the morning sun to make your journey long and good.

You look on the table, on the floor, and in the box, but the key is not there. You have to go on your journey.

You walk into the garden and see a big green tree. A funny old bird sits in the tree, and it looks like it knows the story of the key.

You call to the bird, and the bird looks down at you with one big eye. Then the bird jumps up and you hear a loud word. A red fish in the garden water runs out too, and now two small mice run out and hide. This is a very bad day for quiet!

You ask your friend to help you on your journey, and she is very kind. She has a blue hat and a new book, and she is not hungry or cold like you.

You and her walk to the park, then to the street, and then to the old house. There, the dog sleep close to the door, and the key is in his slow, warm hand!

You laugh and smile, and the bird in the tree comes and sits on your happy hand. The journey was long, but you have the key now, and that is all that is good.

Cat Detective Blue has a big house and a funny hat. One day, a small mouse come to her door. "I need help," she say. "A key. The key not here. It hide in a castle!" Blue want to find the key, so she start a journey into the park and out to the street. The journey is long, but Blue not stop. She walk slow and look at all the tree and house on the way. Then she see a old blue castle in the garden of an old dog. The castle have one big door and two small windows. Blue open the door and find the key on the table. She jump up and laugh, happy. The mouse give her some cheese and fish for food. Blue read a book and then she sit in her warm chair. "A good journey to a good castle," she say with a smile. She close the door and go home to sleep.

I see a small cat at the door of the old house.

She has two big eyes and one funny whisker that goes up and down.

The whisker is very quick, like it wants to find food or hide something.

I say, "Do you have a name?"

She look at me, and I think she like me.

I have an old umbrella in the room. It is blue and big.

I give the umbrella to the cat, and she stand up and run out into the garden.

The rain come down, and the umbrella help her and the water go all the way to the green tree.

The cat sit close to the umbrella and not sad now.

I go out to the park and find a red hat for her to sleep in.

She come home when the sun go down, and I open a box of cheese and fish for her.

She eat slow and quiet, and her funny whisker find the food very good.

I ask her to come and we sit at the table and read a story.

She look at me with her big eye, and I feel warm and happy.

We find a new friend here, and I love her very much.

Bingo is a funny dog. He live in a small house with a green garden. One day, Bingo start to discover a new room. He walk into a room he do not know. He find a big chair and a old table there. He like to discover new rooms, so he go to find more. In one room, he see a blue box and a red hat on the floor. Bingo is brave when he hear a loud bird at the window. He stand up on his two back feet and look out, but the bird do not stop. He is very brave, and the cat next door call to him. "Come out, Bingo!" she say. "The rain come in!" They laugh and ask for help. Bingo is brave again when a small mouse run out of the wall and into his hand. He open the blue box and find some food in it. He eat the food and feel happy. He tell his friend, "We discover new things and we laugh all day!"

The garden is quiet and green in the morning.

A small cat sits on the old chair and looks at the tree.

The cat has two big eyes and one funny whisker that goes up and down.

His whisker is very slow, and it makes him look kind of sad.

A bird in the tree does not like the cat, but the cat does not run.

Then the cat start to work. He walk close to the tree and find a small fish in the green water.

He is happy, and his funny whisker up and down again, quick now.

A dog come to the garden and see the cat with the fish.

The dog ask the cat, "Do you have food for me too?"

The cat look at the dog, and there is a mystery in his big eye. He do not know what to say.

The cat give the fish to the dog, and the dog is very happy.

Now the garden have two funny friends, and the mystery of the cat is no more.

They sit and eat, and the sun is warm and good for all of them.

A small mouse run out of the wall and into a new room. A new mystery for the morning!

The cat and the dog laugh, and the bird in the tree call down to them.

They all read a story in the quiet garden, and the cold rain stop at last.

The old house on the street is very big and very cold.

At night, a small cat and a small dog like to hide in the old house.

One day, the cat find a big key on the floor of the old house.

The dog see the key too, and he run to the door.

The cat say, "Do not go! Come and play!"

But the dog is hungry, and he want to open a box in the old house.

The cat tell him, "This is an adventure! We do not know what is in the box!"

The dog laugh, and they go into the old house for the adventure.

They find a funny old chair, a blue book, and some red food.

The cat eat the food, and the dog eat the food too.

Then they hear a loud bird in the tree, and they feel sad.

But the cat say, "We have a good story here, and that is not bad."

They sit close, and they read the old book and sleep in the old house.

In the morning, the two small friends smile and walk out into the garden.

The old house on the street is very quiet at night.

A small cat sits at the door and looks in.

In the old house, there is one room with a big blue chair and a red hat on the table.

Some say that the red hat is old, but a friend says she know a wizard who have a hat like this.

A wizard is a very funny name, but her word is not bad. It is kind.

The wizard in the story love to read old books and find new words for them.

At night, the wizard sit in the big blue chair, close to the warm wall, and she do not need a friend.

One cold night, the cat run into the room and jump on the table.

The wizard laugh and say, "Yes, cat, come here!"

She give the cat some food, and the cat stop and sit on the floor.

Then a small mouse run out of a box and hide in the old book.

The wizard open the book and find a key in it, and she use the key to close the box.

The cat and the mouse look at her, and the wizard smile.

She tell them a new story, and they all feel warm and happy.

In the morning, the wizard go out to the garden, and the sun is good and warm.

She think of the old house, the funny cat, and the kind mouse, and she smile too.

I live in a small house on a green street. One day, I see a new cat at the door. She has big, funny eyes and a red hat. I ask her to come in, and she walks in slow and quiet. We sit on the chair and I tell her a story. The story is about an adventure. We run into a park, catch a bird, and find a key in the garden. The cat laughs. Yes, she laughs! She is very kind, and she likes my story. We do the adventure again in the morning. We run, we jump, we look for fish in the water. The cat is happy, and I feel happy too. She is not sad or cold or hungry here. We eat some food at the table, and then we go to sleep. I think this is a good adventure, and I love my new friend.

The cat has a key. The key is not here now. The cat look on the floor. The cat look in the basket. The basket is big and red. The key not in the basket. The cat go to the old house. The old house is a castle. The castle is very big and cold. The cat walk room to room. She find a basket in the castle. The key is in the basket! The cat happy. She run to her friend, the dog. The dog come quick. They open the door. The key in the basket. The cat tell the dog the story. The dog laugh and smile. They go home and eat good food. The cat and the dog happy again.

Cat Detective Blue has a big hat and a funny name.

One day, a small mouse run out of her house and say, "Help! I need a friend!"

Blue cat walk close to the mouse and ask, "Do you know, a bad creature live in this room. It eat all the food!"

The mouse look at Blue with two big eyes and say, "Yes, a cold and slow creature, not kind, like a old dog or a bird."

Blue cat smile and say, "I love this story. Let me find the key."

She go to the window and see a red box on the table, and in the box there is a blue book.

Then she hear a loud word. A new word. A creature that not sleep, not run, but stand and make the room very cold.

Blue cat jump up, open the box, and find a small key in the floor.

She run to the door, and the creature run out into the garden and hide in the green tree!

Now the mouse and Blue cat sit in the warm sun, and Blue give some fish and cheese to the hungry creature.

The creature eat, then come close, and they all feel happy again.

There is a big tree in the garden. A small blue bird lives in the tree. The bird and the tree are very good friends. The bird has one secret. A secret that no one else can hear. The bird likes to whisper her secret to the tree. She makes the whisper very quiet, so the cat and the dog and the mouse do not hear it. One day, the bird asks the tree to help her find her secret. She tell the tree a story of a funny old hat and a red fish. The tree is kind, and he does not laugh at her story. The bird and the tree sit close and read a book out in the garden. The sun is warm and the rain is not here. The bird is happy, and she does not need to whisper now. She is slow and quiet, and she and the tree work to get more food for the new day. The dog comes to the door, but the bird is up in the tree, and the dog is too slow to catch her. She is happy in her tree, and her secret is good and warm.

The rain comes down all morning. It is very cold and the day is silent. No bird, no dog, no cat, and no mouse. The house is quiet and silent, like a small old room. A cat sits on the floor and looks at the window. She is hungry, and she has a basket. A big, old basket by the door. The cat is slow to open the basket, but then she finds some food in it. Two fish and a small bird with blue and green hat. She is happy to see her basket again. The dog is not here, but the cat tells the silent house: "I have food, and I love this basket!" A friend calls out to her from the park: "Come and play, we have a new story to read!" The cat is funny. She runs out of the silent house into the rain with a big smile. The dog and the friend laugh, and the cat jumps and runs, and they all go to the garden to find more water and good food. It is not a bad day when the rain is kind.
